 {"id":"bd-212m.1.3","title":"Re-run full conformance after infra fix","description":"Re-run full conformance after infra fixes to prove the benchmark compile path is stable and to refresh parity data.

Scope:
- Run cargo test -p charmed_conformance -- --nocapture with isolated CARGO_HOME/TARGET_DIR.
- Ensure benchmark_e2e compilation tests pass.
- Record per-crate pass/skip counts and update FEATURE_PARITY.md.
- Attach any notable log artifacts under target/ with timestamp.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Conformance run completes with 0 failures.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md reflects new pass/fail/skip counts and infra status.
- Any remaining skips are documented with explicit reason and corresponding bead references.","notes":"Use a unique target dir to avoid cross-agent contention (e.g., CARGO_HOME=target/cargo_home_<ts> CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/conformance_<ts>).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:35.870872131Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:33:54.967734141Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:35.870872131Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:44.133117533Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.1.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.4.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T01:33:54.967670010Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.10","title":"Run conformance suite (snapshot 2026-01-25)","description":"Execute `cargo test -p charmed_conformance -- --nocapture` and record results (pass/skip/fail). Capture benchmark_e2e failures due to cargo lock contention and store summary in FEATURE_PARITY.md.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:54:59.151233809Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T00:55:06.224675470Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T00:55:06.224657356Z","close_reason":"Ran conformance suite; 161 passed, 4 failed (benchmark_e2e compile locks), 6 ignored. Results recorded in FEATURE_PARITY.md.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:54:59.151233809Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2","title":"Glamour parity discrepancies","description":"Resolve Glamour (markdown renderer) output discrepancies vs Go. Conformance currently skips 18 fixtures covering inline code spacing, nested lists, task list markers, link rendering, email autolink formatting, image arrow glyph, blockquote paragraph spacing, and style presets.

Scope:
- Implement fixes in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (and related modules) to match Go output.
- Update or regenerate fixtures in tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glamour.json as needed.
- Add unit tests around renderer behavior and ensure conformance tests pass without skips.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- All Glamour fixtures in tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs pass (0 skipped for known discrepancies).
- Unit tests cover each formerly skipped behavior (inline code spacing, lists, links, blockquotes, presets).
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with new Glamour status.","notes":"Key files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs, crates/glamour/src/table.rs, crates/glamour/src/syntax.rs, tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs, tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glamour.json.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:50.891993187Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:24:23.897871899Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2","depends_on_id":"bd-212m","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:50.891993187Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-212m.2.1","title":"Glamour: fix inline-code spacing vs Go","description":"Fix inline-code spacing to match Go output.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: format_mixed, style_preset_dark, style_preset_light.
- Inspect Event::Code handling and style_inline_code in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs; compare how adjacent text nodes are concatenated and where extra spaces are inserted.
- Adjust renderer to avoid extra space before/after inline code while preserving expected word separation.
- Add unit tests for mixed inline code + text spacing.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- format_mixed, style_preset_dark, style_preset_light fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- New unit test(s) cover inline code in mid-sentence and around punctuation.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance test_glamour passes for these fixtures.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (Event::Code, style_inline_code, text concatenation), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for format_mixed + preset renders.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:59.957118181Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:24:34.963956468Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:59.957118181Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
+{"id":"bd-212m.2.1","title":"Glamour: fix inline-code spacing vs Go","description":"Fix inline-code spacing to match Go output.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: format_mixed, style_preset_dark, style_preset_light.
- Inspect Event::Code handling and style_inline_code in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs; compare how adjacent text nodes are concatenated and where extra spaces are inserted.
- Adjust renderer to avoid extra space before/after inline code while preserving expected word separation.
- Add unit tests for mixed inline code + text spacing.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- format_mixed, style_preset_dark, style_preset_light fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- New unit test(s) cover inline code in mid-sentence and around punctuation.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance test_glamour passes for these fixtures.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (Event::Code, style_inline_code, text concatenation), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for format_mixed + preset renders.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:59.957118181Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:37:15.343022360Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.1","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:45:59.957118181Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.10","title":"Glamour: re-run fixtures + update go_outputs","description":"After fixing Glamour discrepancies, re-run Go reference capture and update fixtures.

Scope:
- Run Go reference capture for Glamour (tests/conformance/go_reference/cmd/glamour) to regenerate go_outputs/glamour.json if needed.
- Update tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glamour.json and ensure fixtures align with new behavior.
- Re-run conformance to confirm 0 skips for Glamour.
- Record fixture generation commands and logs.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- go_outputs/glamour.json updated (if behavior changed) and committed.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance test_glamour passes with 0 skips for former discrepancies.
- FEATURE_PARITY.md updated with new Glamour status.","notes":"Files: tests/conformance/go_reference/cmd/glamour, tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/glamour.json, tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:47:10.195267667Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:26:08.652376099Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:47:10.195267667Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:47:41.346873431Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:47:49.796389196Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:47:56.596045225Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:03.215228177Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:11.363008459Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:18.645933958Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:27.452349790Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:36.454625155Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.10","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:48:44.221983810Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.2","title":"Glamour: align nested list rendering","description":"Align nested list rendering (indentation, bullet/numbering rules) with Go.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: list_nested_unordered, list_nested_ordered, list_mixed_nested.
- Trace list handling in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (Event::Start(Tag::List), list context stack, indentation).
- Implement Go-matching rules for first-item numbering and nested bullet alignment.
- Add unit tests for nested list indentation and numbering transitions.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- list_nested_unordered, list_nested_ordered, list_mixed_nested pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover: unordered->ordered nesting, ordered->unordered nesting, and mixed list depth transitions.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for list fixtures.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (list rendering logic + list context), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for nested lists.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:06.556068091Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:24:42.178189441Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.2","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:06.556068091Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.3","title":"Glamour: fix task list marker rendering","description":"Fix task list marker rendering to match Go (checkbox markers and bullets).

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixture: list_task_list.
- Identify where task list markers are parsed/rendered (pulldown-cmark Event::TaskListMarker or equivalent handling in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs).
- Adjust marker output to match Go (no extra bullet, correct spacing and marker glyph).
- Add unit tests for checked/unchecked task list items.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- list_task_list fixture passes with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover checked + unchecked task items and spacing around marker.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for task list cases.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (list/task list handling), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for list_task_list.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:14.684989440Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:24:50.361389165Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:14.684989440Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
